new_claims.claim_text: X officially demonetized Dom Lucre for 90 days for posting fake, AI-generated war footage.
new_claims.notes: Action taken by platform against disinformation.

new_claims.claim_text: Elon Musk offers a Cybertruck for proof of who wrote a scripted propaganda video.
new_claims.notes: Incentive for exposing sources of propaganda.

new_claims.claim_text: Police issued a ₹10,000 pollution fine on an electric vehicle with no engine and no emissions.
new_claims.notes: Example of bureaucratic disconnect and potential unaccountability.

new_claims.claim_text: Joe Rogan discusses AI's potential to hack everyone's private data within a year.
new_claims.notes: Concerns about AI and digital privacy.

new_claims.claim_text: Maine is poised to become the first state to pass a temporary ban on data center construction.
new_claims.notes: Represents localized control over data infrastructure.
